wine_experiences.name: Chianti Helicopter Wine Tour Fly to Wine
wine_experiences.description: Helicopter departing Florence overflies the Chianti and Vernaccia vineyards before landing at Tenuta Torciano in San Gimignano. Three-hour winery experience with lunch then helicopter return; total programme around six hours.
wine_experiences.duration: 6 hours including flight, winery and lunch

wine_experiences.name: Blending Workshop at Antinori nel Chianti Classico
wine_experiences.address: Via Cassia per Siena 133, Loc. Bargino, 50026 San Casciano in Val di Pesa, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on blending workshop at the Antinori nel Chianti Classico cellars in Bargino, guided by the winemaking team. Participants blend Sangiovese, Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc and Merlot vat samples; bottle their blend on-site.

verified.address_quoted: Via Cassia per Siena, 133, Loc. Bargino, 50026 San Casciano Val di Pesa

wine_experiences.name: Truffle Hunting and Chianti Classico Wine Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Centro Visitatori Tartufo, Via Augusto Conti 26, 56028 San Miniato, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Half-day truffle hunt in San Miniato (source of nearly 80 percent of the world's white truffle) followed by a structured tasting at a Chianti Classico producer. Truffle lunch in the hunter's farmhouse between the two halves.
wine_experiences.duration: 8 hours including truffle hunt, lunch and winery tasting

wine_experiences.name: Brunello Harvest Experience at Castiglion del Bosco
wine_experiences.address: Localita Castiglion del Bosco, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Multi-day Brunello harvest participation programme at Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco. Guests join the cellar team for manual sorting, fermentation cellar work, and daily pairing dinners with vintners; September-October only.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 450-650 per person per day, full board

wine_experiences.name: Self-Drive Vespa Chianti Wine Day from Florence
wine_experiences.description: Florencetown's flagship full-day Vespa wine tour. Minivan transfer to a Chianti winery, Vespa training, then up to seven hours of self-drive riding through cypress-lined backroads with two winery stops and full Tuscan lunch.
wine_experiences.duration: 9 hours including transfers, Vespa training, lunch and tastings

wine_experiences.name: Castello Banfi Cellar Tour and Pairing Lunch
wine_experiences.address: Castello di Poggio alle Mura 1, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Guided cellar tour at Castello Banfi covering the historic Brunello vineyards plus a four-course pairing lunch at the Taverna Banfi restaurant. Includes the Bottle and Glass Museum and Banfi estate library Brunello vertical.

verified.address_quoted: Castello di Poggio alle Mura, 1, Montalcino, Italy 53024

wine_experiences.name: Capezzana Vin Santo Vinsantaia Experience
wine_experiences.description: Visit to the Vinsantaia at Tenuta di Capezzana to see Vin Santo di Carmignano DOC production: grape drying lofts and chestnut caratelli. Includes vertical tasting across multiple Vin Santo vintages with Trebbiano-San Colombano blend.

wine_experiences.name: Bolgheri Cypress Avenue Cycling and Wine Tour
wine_experiences.description: Half-day guided cycling tour along the iconic 5km cypress avenue from Bolgheri village down to San Guido, passing the Sassicaia vineyards. Two winery stops including a Bolgheri DOC producer with tasting and lunch.
wine_experiences.duration: 5 hours including cycling, two cellar visits and lunch

wine_experiences.name: Candlelit Cellar Dinner at Castello Banfi
wine_experiences.address: Castello di Poggio alle Mura 1, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Private dinner in the historic Banfi barrel cellar, available to Il Borgo hotel guests and private groups. Five-course Tuscan menu paired with Banfi Brunello di Montalcino across three vintages plus Poggio alle Mura Riserva.

verified.address_quoted: Castello di Poggio alle Mura, 1, Montalcino, Italy 53024

wine_experiences.name: Castello di Verrazzano Tour and Lunch
wine_experiences.address: Via Citille 32, 50022 Greve in Chianti, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Guided tour of the historic Verrazzano gardens and cellars in Greve, followed by tasting of four organic estate wines plus Vin Santo and a full Tuscan farm-table lunch with estate produce.
wine_experiences.duration: 4 hours including tour, tasting and lunch
